title: Valutazione Trimestrale — La Routine Quotidiana

criteria.name: grammatical_accuracy
criteria.descriptor: Correct use of present tense regular verbs, articles, subject-verb agreement

criteria.name: vocabulary_range
criteria.descriptor: Uses 10+ daily routine verbs correctly in context

criteria.name: communicative_effectiveness
criteria.descriptor: Message is understood by an Italian speaker without clarification

criteria.name: creative_expression
criteria.descriptor: Goes beyond minimum requirements with personal detail

sample_grading_notes: This teacher consistently weighs grammatical accuracy highest — a student who communicates well but with errors gets 'buono' not 'eccellente'. Creative expression is rewarded but never compensates for grammar gaps.

adaptations_provided.foundational: word bank, sentence starters, reduced length (5 sentences)
adaptations_provided.extended: no scaffold, minimum 10 sentences, include reflexive verbs
